meta.goal: Get ripped — lose fat, keep muscle, reveal definition
meta.calcNote: BMR ~1,535 kcal (Mifflin-St Jeor); maintenance ~2,250 kcal. Phase aims (1850/1750/1650) give a ~400–600 kcal deficit. Protein ~160g protects muscle while cutting.
principles: ⚠️ Right-foot friendly: no running, jumping or heavy calf/single-leg loading on the right foot. Train only in pain-free ranges, ice after sessions, and check in with a physio.
Hit your protein target every single day — it protects muscle while you cut.
Stay active daily, but keep it low-impact for your right foot — favour cycling over long walks or running.
Sleep 7–9 hours. Fat loss happens when you recover.
Weigh yourself same time each morning; judge progress on the weekly average, not single days.
One flexible meal a week is fine — stay roughly within calories.
meta.notes: Adapted for posterior tibial tendinitis (right foot): low-impact cardio (cycling/elliptical), no running or jumping, and leg work swapped to bilateral/seated/supported options (leg press, wall sit, glute bridge, seated leg curl) instead of lunges, split squats and calf raises.

phases.name: Foundation
phases.tagline: Build the habit + reawaken the muscles
phases.focus: Full-body strength 3x/week to keep muscle, easy cardio to start the fat burn. Don't go too hard yet — we're building consistency.
phases.cardioNote: Zone 2 = brisk pace where you can still hold a conversation.

schedule.name: Full Body B
homeItems: Pike push-ups / DB shoulder press — 3 x 10

schedule.name: Full Body C
homeItems: Incline push-ups / DB floor press — 3 x 12

schedule.name: Low-Impact Intervals
items: 10 x (30s hard / 60s easy) — bike or seated rower, no running
homeItems: 10 x (30s hard: shadow-boxing + fast arm circles / 60s easy) — no jumping

schedule.name: Rest & Recover
items: Easy 20-min cycle or gentle mobility — keep weight off the right foot

phases.name: Build & Burn
phases.tagline: Upper/Lower split + intervals — turn up the heat
phases.focus: 4 lifting days split upper/lower, plus harder intervals. Calories drop slightly as the cut deepens. Push the weights — keep reps in the tank with 1–2 left.
phases.cardioNote: Add weight or reps each week vs. the last — progressive overload.

schedule.name: Upper Hypertrophy
homeItems: Superset: DB curls + triceps — 3 x 12 each

schedule.name: Lower Hypertrophy
homeItems: DB hip thrust / glute bridge — 4 x 12

schedule.name: Low-Impact HIIT
items: 12 x (30s hard / 60s easy) — bike or seated rower
homeItems: 12 x (30s hard: shadow-boxing + standing band punches / 60s easy) — no jumping

schedule.name: Rest & Recover
items: Easy 25-min cycle or gentle mobility — keep weight off the right foot

phases.adjust: Trim ~100 kcal: skip the evening snack on rest days, or swap a snack for fruit.

phases.name: Shred
phases.tagline: Push/Pull/Legs + extra cardio — bring out the definition
phases.focus: Push/Pull/Legs with an upper pump day and more cardio. Tightest calories of the plan but highest protein. This is where the abs show up — stay disciplined, you're nearly there.
phases.cardioNote: If energy dips, keep the lifts and trim cardio — never trim protein.

schedule.name: Low-Impact HIIT + Core
items: 15 x (30s hard / 45s easy) — bike or seated rower
homeItems: 15 x (30s hard: shadow-boxing + core / 45s easy) — no jumping

schedule.name: Legs
homeItems: DB hip thrust / glute bridge — 3 x 12

schedule.name: Rest & Recover
items: Easy 30-min cycle or gentle mobility — keep weight off the right foot

phases.adjust: Trim ~200 kcal: drop the evening snack daily and keep starchy carbs to training days.

Breakfast.text: Greek yogurt bowl — 200g 0% Greek yogurt + 1 scoop whey + 40g granola + 80g blueberries

Lunch.text: Chicken & rice bowl — 150g chicken breast, 60g (dry) rice, mixed veg, soy + sriracha

Dinner.text: Turkey meatballs (150g 5% mince) + 70g pasta + marinara + parmesan
Dinner.prep: If your turkey mince is frozen, move it to the fridge tonight to defrost.

steps: Mix the mince with half the garlic, oregano, salt & pepper; roll into 5–6 meatballs.
Brown the meatballs in the oil over medium heat ~6 min, turning. Remove.
Soften onion & remaining garlic in the pan; add passata and simmer 8–10 min.
Return meatballs and simmer 8 min until cooked through.
Boil pasta to pack timing; drain and toss through the sauce, top with parmesan.

Breakfast.text: 3-egg omelette + spinach + 30g cheddar + 2 slices wholegrain toast

Lunch.text: Turkey & salad wrap (120g turkey, wholemeal) + small Greek yogurt

Dinner.text: Lean beef chilli con carne (150g 5% mince + kidney beans) + 60g rice
Dinner.prep: Defrost the beef mince overnight if frozen — chilli also tastes better made a day ahead.

ingredients: 1 tsp chilli powder + ½ tsp cumin
steps: Brown the mince in the oil; drain any excess fat.
Add onion, pepper and garlic; soften 4–5 min.
Stir in the spices for 1 min, then the tomatoes and beans.
Simmer 20–25 min until thick.
Cook rice to pack timing and serve alongside.

Breakfast.text: Overnight oats — 50g oats + 1 scoop whey + 10g peanut butter + ½ banana
Breakfast.prep: Make tonight — mix the oats, whey, peanut butter & banana, cover and leave in the fridge overnight.

Lunch.text: Chicken pasta salad — 130g chicken, 70g pasta, cherry tomatoes, light pesto

Dinner.text: Chicken stir-fry — 150g chicken, 120g egg noodles, peppers, broccoli, soy

steps: Cook noodles to pack, drain and set aside.
Stir-fry chicken in the oil over high heat 4–5 min until cooked. Remove.
Add broccoli & pepper; stir-fry 3–4 min, then garlic & ginger for 30s.
Return chicken & noodles, add soy + sriracha and toss 1–2 min.

Breakfast.text: Scrambled eggs (3) + 2 turkey rashers + smashed avocado on 1 slice toast

Dinner.text: Chicken fajitas — 150g chicken, peppers, onion, 2 small tortillas, salsa, light cheese

steps: Toss the chicken with the fajita seasoning.
Fry chicken in the oil over high heat 5–6 min until cooked; remove.
Add peppers & onion; char 4–5 min.
Warm tortillas and fill with chicken, veg, salsa & cheese.

Breakfast.text: Greek yogurt + 40g granola + 1 scoop whey + raspberries

Lunch.text: Chicken wrap (130g chicken, light Caesar) + side salad

Dinner.text: Pork loin steak (150g) + new potatoes (200g) + green veg

steps: Boil new potatoes 15–18 min until tender; drain.
Season the pork; pan-fry in the oil 3–4 min each side until cooked. Rest 2 min.
Steam or boil the green veg 4–5 min.
Toss potatoes with the garlic; plate with pork & veg.

Breakfast.text: Protein pancakes — 40g oats + 1 egg + 1 scoop whey + ½ banana, with Greek yogurt

Lunch.text: Chicken burrito bowl — 140g chicken, 70g rice, salsa, sweetcorn, light cheese

Dinner.text: Spaghetti bolognese — 150g 5% beef mince + 75g spaghetti + parmesan
Dinner.prep: Defrost the beef mince overnight if frozen.

steps: Brown the mince in the oil; drain excess fat.
Add onion, carrot and garlic; soften 5 min.
Add tomatoes & oregano; simmer 20–25 min.
Boil spaghetti to pack timing; drain.
Toss with the sauce and top with parmesan.

Breakfast.text: Veggie & cheese omelette (3 eggs) + 1 slice wholegrain toast

Lunch.text: Chicken & roast veg couscous — 140g chicken, 60g couscous

Dinner.text: Chicken & veg curry — 150g chicken, tomato/light-coconut sauce + 60g rice

steps: Fry onion in the oil 4 min; add garlic, ginger and curry paste for 1 min.
Add chicken and brown 4–5 min.
Stir in tomatoes, coconut milk and pepper; simmer 12–15 min.
Cook rice to pack timing and serve.

Breakfast.text: Wholemeal bagel + light cream cheese + 2 scrambled eggs

Lunch.text: Lean ham & cheese toastie (wholegrain) + side salad + small Greek yogurt

Dinner.text: BBQ chicken (160g) + sweet potato wedges (200g) + corn on the cob

steps: Heat oven to 200°C. Toss sweet potato wedges in the oil + paprika; roast 25–30 min.
Coat the chicken in BBQ sauce; bake 18–22 min until cooked.
Boil the corn 6–8 min and serve.

Breakfast.text: Porridge (50g oats, milk) + 1 scoop whey + blueberries + honey

Lunch.text: Jacket potato + 130g chicken + light cheese + side salad

Dinner.text: Beef & broccoli stir-fry — 150g lean beef strips + 60g rice
Dinner.prep: Defrost the beef strips overnight if frozen.

steps: Cook rice to pack timing.
Sear beef in the oil over high heat 2–3 min; remove.
Stir-fry broccoli 3–4 min (splash of water to steam), then garlic & ginger 30s.
Return beef, add soy (+ oyster) and toss 1 min. Serve over rice.

Breakfast.text: Greek yogurt parfait — 200g yogurt + 1 scoop whey + 40g granola + strawberries

Lunch.text: Chicken & rice power bowl — 150g chicken, 60g rice, mixed veg

Dinner.text: Chicken pesto pasta — 150g chicken, 75g pasta, light pesto, cherry tomatoes

steps: Boil pasta to pack timing; reserve a splash of water, then drain.
Fry chicken in the oil 6–7 min until cooked.
Off the heat, stir the pesto + a splash of pasta water through the pasta & chicken.
Fold in cherry tomatoes; top with parmesan.

Breakfast.text: Egg & cheese breakfast wrap (2 eggs, wholemeal tortilla)

Lunch.text: Lean beef meatball sub (120g 5% mince, wholegrain roll) + salad

Dinner.text: Pork & apple traybake — 150g pork, new potatoes (200g) + veg

steps: Heat oven to 200°C. Toss potatoes, onion & veg in the oil + rosemary; roast 15 min.
Add the pork & apple to the tray; roast a further 18–20 min until the pork is cooked.

Lunch.text: Chicken shawarma wrap — 140g chicken, wholemeal flatbread + salad
Lunch.prep: Optional: marinate the chicken in shawarma spice + a little yogurt tonight.

Dinner.text: 2 turkey burgers (brioche thins) + oven sweet-potato chips + salad

steps: Heat oven to 200°C. Toss sweet potato chips in the oil + paprika; roast 25–30 min.
Grill or pan-fry the turkey burgers 5–6 min each side until cooked.
Build in the brioche thins with the salad on the side.

Breakfast.text: Cottage cheese (150g) + 2 poached eggs + 1 slice toast

Lunch.text: Chicken noodle soup (150g chicken) + wholegrain roll + cheese

Dinner.prep: Marinate the chicken in tikka paste + yogurt tonight for the best flavour.

steps: Mix the tikka paste + yogurt; coat the chicken and marinate 15 min if you have time.
Grill or bake the chicken 12–15 min, turning, until charred & cooked.
Cook rice; warm the naan. Serve with onion & lemon.

Breakfast.text: Smoothie bowl — 1 scoop whey, banana, 30g oats, yogurt + granola topping

Dinner.text: 4 reduced-fat sausages + mash + onion gravy + peas

steps: Grill or bake the sausages 18–20 min, turning.
Boil potatoes 15 min; mash with a splash of milk, season.
Soften onion in the oil 8–10 min; add gravy and simmer 3 min.
Boil peas 3 min. Plate sausages with mash, peas & onion gravy.

steps: Heat oven to 200°C. Toss sweet potato chips in the oil + paprika; roast 25–30 min.
Grill or pan-fry the turkey burgers 5–6 min each side until cooked.

dinner.text: Chicken tikka (160g) + 60g rice + mini naan
dinner.prep: Marinate the chicken in tikka paste + yogurt tonight for the best flavour.

steps: Mix the tikka paste + yogurt; coat the chicken and marinate 15 min if you have time.
Grill or bake the chicken 12–15 min, turning, until charred & cooked.
Cook rice; warm the naan. Serve with onion & lemon.

dinner.text: 4 reduced-fat sausages + mash + onion gravy + peas

steps: Grill or bake the sausages 18–20 min, turning.
Boil potatoes 15 min; mash with a splash of milk, season.
Soften onion in the oil 8–10 min; add gravy and simmer 3 min.
Boil peas 3 min. Plate sausages with mash, peas & onion gravy.

dinner.text: Turkey chilli + rice (with beans)

ingredients: 1 tsp chilli powder + ½ tsp cumin
steps: Brown the turkey mince in the oil.
Add onion, pepper and garlic; soften 4–5 min.
Stir in spices, tomatoes & beans; simmer 20 min.
Cook rice and serve.

dinner.text: Cottage pie (lean beef mince) + veg

ingredients: 150ml beef stock + splash milk for mash
steps: Brown the mince; add onion & garlic and soften.
Add purée, tomatoes & stock; simmer 15 min until thick.
Boil & mash the potatoes with a splash of milk.
Top the mince with mash; bake 200°C 18–20 min. Serve with veg.

dinner.text: Pork meatballs in tomato sauce + pasta

steps: Roll the pork mince into balls; brown in the oil. Remove.
Soften onion & garlic; add passata & oregano and simmer 8 min.
Return meatballs and simmer 8–10 min.
Boil pasta; toss through the sauce and top with parmesan.

dinner.text: Chicken & chorizo (light) rice one-pot

steps: Fry chorizo 1–2 min to release its oil; add chicken and brown.
Add onion, pepper & garlic; soften 4 min.
Stir in rice, paprika, tomatoes & stock.
Cover and simmer 18–20 min until the rice is cooked.

dinner.text: Chicken souvlaki + mini pitta + salad
dinner.prep: Marinate the chicken in lemon, garlic & oregano tonight.

ingredients: 1 tsp olive oil (5ml) + squeeze lemon, oregano
steps: Toss the chicken with oil, lemon & oregano; thread on skewers if you like.
Grill or pan-fry 10–12 min until charred & cooked.
Warm the pitta; serve with the salad & tzatziki.

dinner.text: Gammon steak, egg & sautéed potatoes + peas

steps: Par-boil the diced potatoes 6 min; drain.
Sauté the potatoes in the oil 8–10 min until golden.
Grill or pan-fry the gammon 3–4 min each side. Fry the egg.
Boil peas 3 min. Plate everything together.

evening.text: Casein + almond butter on an oatcake
